feature.name: page-demo-booking
feature.description: Demo booking page — hero with dashboard preview, 6 benefit cards (Why book a demo), trust bar with stats, What You'll See 6-step timeline, What You'll Walk Away With value grid, booking form with interactive calendar and time slot selector, FAQ accordion for common objections.
acceptanceCriteria: 6 benefit cards with clear value propositions
What You'll See timeline with 6 visual steps
What You'll Walk Away With value grid
Booking form with all required fields
Interactive calendar with selectable time slots

seo.title: Book a Demo — OptiFlow OS
